commits.author: Jérémy Franck
commits.subject: hide(AI): speed up AI by reducing reasoning
commits.body:
The "medium" level of reasoning was an experiment to see if it would improve the output of the model.

It doesn't improve results in a meaningful way, and it's becoming increasignly apparent that the right levers to action are:
- rewritting the documentation
- use of the RAG system

As a result, switching back to "low" reasoning effort, which halves the time AI takes to return results

ETC-525.title: Prevent Copy/Paste highjacking in inputs
ETC-525.description:
[https://community.etchwp.com/c/general-discussion/copy-paste](<https://community.etchwp.com/c/general-discussion/copy-paste>)
Currently alot of our inputs break when copy pasting, because our "Copy/Paste Block" wins.

* The user can copy paste in inputs without our Copy/Paste highjacking it
* If no input is focused he can copy paste blocks as normal
